Title: createOrderFromCart — Anonymous Guest Checkout
Preconditions: BLOCKED: Anonymous/guest checkout requires (a) store setting createAnonymousOrderEnabled=true and (b) the GraphQL runner to support an explicit no-auth path for cart mutations. Current runner attaches token from the last [AUTH] if any — can be omitted entirely but a full guest-cart flow still needs anonymous-session primitives and a valid shipment/payment method resolved without org context. Mark Draft until store + runner support is confirmed.
Steps: [MANUAL-BLOCKED] Needs createAnonymousOrderEnabled=true + runner anonymous-session support. Execute via legacy GraphiQL flow until runner is extended.
Failure_Signals: Anonymous user reaches checkout when createAnonymousOrderEnabled=false; HTTP 500; guest order created with null customer context
Cleanup: Cancel any order created via Admin API

Title: createOrderFromCart — Org Member Happy Path (B2B)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER (member of an org) runs the full checkout flow and createOrderFromCart. CREATES A REAL ORDER — Admin cleanup required if needed. Mirrors CRI-GQL-017 but asserts orgId is persisted on the created order.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=create_order] errors[] empty
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.id is non-empty GUID
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.number is non-null
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.status is non-null
[DATA label=create_order] data.createOrderFromCart.organizationId is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] verify data.createOrderFromCart.organizationId matches me.contact.organizationId (orgId persisted on order)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; organizationId null on order (org context lost); set_shipment rejects due to wrong countryCode; HTTP 500
Cleanup: Creates real order — cancel via Admin API if needed
References: xAPI; BL-CHK-001; order-creation-matrix.md; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: createOrderFromCart — Cross-Org Cart Isolation
Preconditions: BLOCKED: Requires a second-org user alias (e.g. TECHFLOW_EMILY_EMAIL/PASSWORD) as _inline entry in aliases.json — current pool only has ORG_USER + USER2 (personal). Similar blocker to WL-022.
Steps: [MANUAL-BLOCKED] Needs second-org user _inline alias. Legacy suite 050b CRI-GQL-058 runs this via GraphiQL.
Failure_Signals: User B creates order from User A's cart (P0 security breach)
Cleanup: Cancel via Admin API if accidental order created

Title: xCart — unSelectCartItems Unselects One of Multiple Items
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item, call unSelectAllCartItems to get items[] synchronously from mutation response, capture first item ID, then call selectCartItems and assert selectedForCheckout=true (roundtrip). Avoids cart-query eventual consistency by using mutation response for ID capture.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=unselect_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=unselect_all] data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.0.selectedForCheckout = false
[ERRORS label=select_one] errors[] empty
[DATA label=select_one] data.selectCartItems.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_1}}].selectedForCheckout = true
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] LINE_ITEM_1: unSelectAll → selectedForCheckout=false; selectOne → selectedForCheckout=true. Roundtrip validates both directions.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on either mutation; LINE_ITEM_1 still selectedForCheckout=true after unselect; selectedForCheckout=false after select; items[] empty
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.unSelectCartItems; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — selectCartItems Re-selects a Previously Unselected Item
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item, unSelectAllCartItems (captures LINE_ITEM_ID synchronously from mutation response), then selectCartItems to re-select. Verify item returns to selectedForCheckout=true.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=unselect_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=unselect_all] data.unSelectAllCartItems.items.0.selectedForCheckout = false
[ERRORS label=reselect] errors[] empty
[DATA label=reselect] data.selectCartItems.items[?id={{LINE_ITEM_ID}}].selectedForCheckout = true
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; item remains unselected after re-select (selectedForCheckout=false); LINE_ITEM_ID not found in items[]
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.selectCartItems; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — unSelectCartItems with Invalid lineItemId — Graceful No-Op
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY), call unSelectAllCartItems to capture REAL_LINE_ID synchronously from mutation response (avoids cart-query eventual consistency). Then call unSelectCartItems with a zero-GUID — verify real item stays selectedForCheckout=true (was set to false by unSelectAll, so re-select first via selectCartItems, then try bogus unselect).
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Real item preserved (selectedForCheckout=true) after unselect with bogus ID. No HTTP 500 or bulk unselect.
Failure_Signals: HTTP 500; real item gets unselected by invalid ID (P0 corruption); stack trace leaks; item flips to selectedForCheckout=false
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.unSelectCartItems error contract; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — selectCartItems Idempotent on Already-Selected Item
Preconditions: Runner-native. addItem (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY), capture LINE_ITEM_ID via unSelectAllCartItems response (synchronous — avoids cart-query eventual consistency), then re-select via selectCartItems. Item was unselected immediately before, so re-select returns it to true; calling selectCartItems on a selected item must not flip it to false (idempotence contract). Verify selectedForCheckout=true after re-select.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] LINE_ITEM_ID selectedForCheckout=true after re-select (no flip to false — idempotence contract)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; item flipped to selectedForCheckout=false (should be true after re-select)
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.selectCartItems idempotence; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — unSelectAllCartItems Unselects Every Item + Zeroes Subtotals
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item, call unSelectAllCartItems, verify subTotal drops to 0. B2B-store may consolidate identical productIds; assert on subTotal=0 (BL-GQL-003 canonical signal), not itemsCount.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=unselect_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=unselect_all] data.unSelectAllCartItems.id is non-null
[DATA label=unselect_all] data.unSelectAllCartItems.subTotal.amount = 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] All items[].selectedForCheckout=false post-unselect; itemsCount >= 1 (raw item count unaffected by selection). subTotal=0 is the canonical signal that unselection was applied to checkout computation.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; subTotal.amount > 0 after unSelectAll (selection not applied to totals); any item still selectedForCheckout=true
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.unSelectAllCartItems; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — selectAllCartItems After Unselect All Restores Selection
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY — confirmed addable for ORG_USER), unselect all, then selectAllCartItems — verify subTotal returns to positive (B2B-store may consolidate items; assert on subTotal > 0, not itemsCount).
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=select_all] errors[] empty
[DATA label=select_all] data.selectAllCartItems.id is non-null
[DATA label=select_all] data.selectAllCartItems.subTotal.amount > 0
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] After selectAll: every items[].selectedForCheckout=true; subTotal.amount > 0 restores to pre-unselect total (runner-manual). itemsCount >= 1.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; subTotal.amount = 0 after selectAll (selection not restored); any item still unselected
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Mutation.selectAllCartItems; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — Checkout Blocked When All Items Unselected
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item, unselect all, set shipment + payment, attempt createOrderFromCart — expect failure (no selected items to order). ISO-3 countryCode and product discovered via query.
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] errors[].message should reference empty cart or no selected items (BL-CHK-001). No HTTP 500. No real order created.
Failure_Signals: Order created with real items despite all unselected (P0: BL-CHK-001 violation); errors[] empty (mutation succeeds when it should fail); HTTP 500
Cleanup: Cancel any order accidentally created via Admin API
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md; BL-CHK-001 validation; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — removeCoupon Removes Applied Coupon
Preconditions: Runner-native. Add item, apply COUPON_10PCT, removeCoupon by code, verify coupons[] no longer contains it and discountTotal returns to 0.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=remove_coupon] errors[] empty
[DATA label=remove_coupon] data.removeCoupon.id is non-null
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Verify coupons[] no longer contains @td(COUPON_10PCT.code). discountTotal.amount = 0 post-remove (runner-manual).
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; coupons[] still contains removed code; discountTotal unchanged after remove

Title: xCart — removeCoupon Silent No-Op on Non-Existent Coupon
Preconditions: Runner-native. Calls removeCoupon with a code that was never applied. Should succeed gracefully (silent no-op, not error).
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Either errors[] non-empty with not-found OR silent success with coupons[] unchanged. NO HTTP 500.
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty with generic server-error (should be silent no-op); HTTP 500

Title: xCart — validateCoupon Query Returns true for Valid Coupon
Preconditions: Runner-native. validateCoupon is a Query (not Mutation) returning Boolean. Passes COUPON_10PCT with a non-empty cart — expects true. PRECONDITION: @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) must resolve to an active coupon eligible for ORG_USER in B2B-store (verify via Admin > Marketing > Promotions). If QA10OFF is expired or scoped out, re-seed via /qa-seed-data. Cart must have items (BUYABLE_NO_MIN_QTY) for discount engine to evaluate eligibility.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP pre_clear]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC pre_clear]
[GQL-OP add_item]
  mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" productId: "{{PRODUCT_ID}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL-EXEC add_item]
[GQL-OP validate]
  query {
    validateCoupon(
      storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}"
      userId: "{{USER_ID}}"
      currencyCode: "USD"
      cultureName: "en-US"
      coupon: "@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)"
    )
  }
[GQL-EXEC validate]
[GQL-OP cleanup_clear]
  mutation { clearCart(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "{{USER_ID}}" }) { id } }
[GQL-EXEC cleanup_clear]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=validate] errors[] empty
[DATA label=validate] data.validateCoupon = true
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] validateCoupon returns Boolean true with non-empty cart and valid coupon (top-level Boolean, no sub-selection — DV-010 would fire on sub-selection)
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty; validateCoupon returns false for known-valid coupon on non-empty cart; HTTP 500
References: xAPI; graphql-schema.md — Query.validateCoupon; Fixed authoring debt (TLC-2026-05-15-2316, 2026-05-15)

Title: xCart — validateCoupon Query Returns false for Invalid Coupon
Preconditions: Runner-native. Passes an invalid coupon code to validateCoupon — expects false, not a crash.
Steps:
[AUTH role=ORG_USER]
[GQL-OP setup_me]
  query { me { id } }
[GQL-EXEC setup_me]
[GQL-CAPTURE setup_me.data.me.id → USER_ID]
[GQL-OP validate_bogus]
  query {
    validateCoupon(
      storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}"
      userId: "{{USER_ID}}"
      currencyCode: "USD"
      coupon: "BADCODE_NOT_VALID_99999"
    )
  }
[GQL-EXEC validate_bogus]
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=validate_bogus] errors[] empty
[DATA label=validate_bogus] data.validateCoupon = false
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Server does not crash or return HTTP 500 on invalid coupon; returns Boolean false
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty with server-error; HTTP 500; stack trace in errors[].message
